name: telegram
description: Telegram channel for your AI assistant — messaging bridge with built-in access control. Manage pairing, allowlists, and policy via /telegram:access.

bot_token.title: Telegram bot token
bot_token.description: Create a bot via @BotFather on Telegram and paste its token here.

access_mode.title: Access mode
access_mode.description: Set to 'static' to lock the bot to a fixed allowlist; leave blank for interactive pairing.

state_dir.title: State directory
state_dir.description: Override where the bridge stores its state. Leave blank to use the default ~/.claude path.
